MoodMelody Find the perfect music for your mood Join 1M+ music lovers already on MoodMelody Music Note Icon University Logo
How are you feeling? We\'ll recommend playlists that match your vibe right now 🎵
Happy Sad Energetic Calm Chill Romantic Party Relaxed

Favorites Your Favorites No Favorites Yet Start adding playlists to your favorites by tapping the heart icon AIzaSyANAk_qObi6lXyFsx0Qem-An2fL16dF4r8
Info App Icon Version 1.0 MoodMelody is your personal music companion that understands your emotions. Discover the perfect songs that match your current mood - whether you\'re feeling happy, sad, energetic, or calm. Let music enhance your emotional journey!
Meet The Team The minds behind MoodMelody 🎶 Email Icon
